title: New Balance Men's 410 V6 Trail Running Shoe
description:
Be off-road ready in the New Balance 410v6 men’s trail shoe. Featuring a durable AT Tread rubber outsole, this shoe is fit for any adventure. Made with a sleek upper, ACTEVA midsole technology and a cushioned NB Comfort Insert, the versatile men’s running shoe is designed to keep you comfortable and stylish before, during and after your hike.
New Balance, is dedicated to helping athletes achieve their goals. It's been their mission for more than a century. It's why they don't spend money on celebrity endorsements. They spend it on research and development. It's why they don't design products to fit an image. They design them to fit. New Balance is driven to make the finest shoes for the same reason athletes lace them up: to achieve the very best.

reviews.title: Not the best looking shoe but the most comfortable!
reviews.text: Man my feet hurt. And because I wear the same shoes everyday all day they break down pretty quickly.  These are perfect.  The color isn't my absolute favorite BUT that was the color that was on sale. Besides I'm nearly 50 so I'm not out to impress anyone lol.  They fit my feet perfectly and  there is no better feeling of new shoes when your old shoes broke down! Just enough support.

reviews.title: Good fit in a large size
reviews.text: I bought these shoes as a gift for my 25 year old son, who wears a size 16. I know from past experience that New Balance provides a good, consistent fit in their large sizes, and this pair did not disappoint. The fit was great and my son liked the color and style.

title: ASICS Men's Gel-Venture 8 Mid Top Running Shoes
description: The GEL-VENTURE 8 MT (Mid-Top) running shoe is designed for the great outdoors. This version offers added ankle support that makes it an excellent choice for those seeking lasting stability. This model has been updated with a more accommodating forefoot fit while reducing the number of overlays around the forefoot without sacrificing durability. Lastly, the outsole is also more durable, incorporating a traction pattern that's been improved with re-engineered lugs under the heel. All of these updates make the new GEL-VENTURE 8 MT shoe an excellent companion for your next adventure.
features: Made in the USA or Imported

reviews.title: Not sure if my feet grew... :)
reviews.text: I'm 55 and normally wear a 11.5 regular so that's what I ordered. My toes were super scrunched up and hitting the tip of the shoe, so I had to return them and order a half size up. They seem narrow in the front to me. Aside from that IMO they look better in the pics than in person but for the price I'm not going to complain too much. Seems like a solid shoe otherwise. The inserts seem to be glued in which is a bummer because I use orthotic inserts especially in my running shoes.

reviews.title: Who'd,thunk....these could be so comfortable
reviews.text: I have been wearing Asics for several years now and have been pleased. They do not last very long but they are comfortable and at about $50 per pair (always buy on sale) it is much cheaper then other name brands. I thought I would try the mid tops as I used to wear hightops in my early years. I am glad I did, they are very comfortable. So good that I just ordered a second pair (grey) as soon as I tried these coffee (brown) ones on. The grey ones are on sale for just $40 so its a no-brainer.

reviews.title: High top Asics
reviews.text: I've worn Asics for ever and was actually skeptical about buying since other reviewers that where Asics gave poor reviews. Well, in glad I bought them. I have always wanted Asics to make a high top and they finally did. These will make great trail shoes. I'm returning a pair of Merrells that didn't fit like old Merrells did. The Asics have built in stability for people with high arches. They are lightweight,  comfortable and fit like good shoes should. Asics didn't drop the bar as others complained, looks like the same high quality at reasonable prices they are known for.

reviews.title: Very Nice Quality for the Price
reviews.text: Fits perfectly.  Very easy to get on and off. So far, the soles appear to be wearing well. I walk on concrete and so far do not notice any appreciable wear.

reviews.title: Size down 1/2 a size
reviews.text: I was a new runner 2 years ago and after much research bought a pair of 1080 v10's.  They immediately reduced the pain I felt when running.  Here I am 1 1/2 years later and in need of a new pair of shoes so I bought these 1080 v12's.  What can I say, they're even better than my v10's.  The only catch was I had to size down 1/2 a size from my normal shoe size.  Once I made that tweak the shoe fit amazingly and I'm off and running again.

reviews.title: Good show, but I can't really run in them...
reviews.text: The fit is right, the sole is not so much right for me.  *For ME* too stiff, too soft, I'm not sure, but the pain set in after a half-mile on a 4 mile run. I had to turn around and cut my run short - my feet hurt.

reviews.title: Comfort - soft foot bed.
reviews.text: 7th or 8th pair - so soft and comfortable for being on your feet for long periods of time.

reviews.title: Great fit

reviews.title: walking on a cloud comfy
reviews.text:
I was looking for a comfortable all-purpose walking, going to work shoe. NB version 11 has more subdued colors. But they brought me v12 out since they didn't have my sizes left. I was hooked as I tried them on. They are the most comfy shoe I ever used, better than any Nike air, better than the walking co. store orthopedic shoes. These were just super soft. The size is what I usually wear if there is no wide version.

Seem breathable, I got the navy blue with orange trims. I think it looks fine, not into the flashy color. I switch to office shoes when I am in the office.

The only issue is the price is very high. This is my first ever new balance, I always thought they were just another running shoe brand, but man the fresh foam is the most cloud-like soles. I only had it for a few weeks, so not sure how long they will last. I usually wear Merrell an outdoor brand, they don't seem to last very long tho.

reviews.title: Great running shoes
reviews.text: Excellent running shoes. The fit is more on the tight side, but it definitely fits. I give it 4/5 stars because it's not quite as comfortable as the Adidas Duramo line which also has adiprene. However I have yet to run a lot in these so it may be better than Duramo in the long term, or for more intense running. Duramo's have extra padding that, while very comfortable, feels like it could eventually start to chafe. These have a more snug fit with no such padding, but are still very comfortable.

title: Salomon Women's Speedcross 3 Trail Running Shoe
description: Salomon was born in 1947 in the heart of the French Alps and the birthplace of modern alpinism. Driven by a passion for skiing and design innovation, Francois Salomon and his son George designed and perfected much of the first modern ski equipment. During the following 60 years, Salomon's commitment to innovative design and passion for mountain sports created a vast range of revolutionary new concepts in boots, skis and apparel and brought innovative solutions to footwear, apparel and equipment for hiking, adventure racing, mountaineering and trail running. Through performance-driven design, Salomon enhances mountain sports by converting new ideas into action and expanding the limits of possibility.
features: 100% Synthetic/Fabric
Rubber sole

Contra grip is designed for better traction and durability on mixed trails and complicated landscapes
Water resistance adds an extra layer of protection from the elements
Lightweight material maximizes comfort, fit, and breathability
Collar shape and sole hardness is specifically designed for a woman's foot

reviews.title: Perfect trail shoe!
reviews.text: Bought these for my wife. Her words are: "I love them"! She says she has wide feet and they still fit perfectly, she wore them all day for a 14 mile mud run/obstacle course and had a great experience with these shoes. Great traction in the mud!

I get many compliments on the appearance, which is streamlined and not at all "clunky."

title: Brooks Womens Ghost 11 Running Shoe
description: The balanced cushioning helps to offer a smooth ride to the neutral runners looking for a versatile performance. With the new soft interior and a refined mesh upper, practically vanishes on the foot mainly thanks to the strategic position of stretch and Structure. Crash Pad segmented along the entire length of the foot that sustains the foot every time it touches the ground and offers soft transitions and the BioMoGo DNA and DNA Loft cushioning even more assure every step of the foot.
features: mesh lining
Lace-Up closure

FOOT SUPPORT: Ideal for runners with a medium to high arch looking for neutral support.
BALANCED, SOFT CUSHIONING: BioMoGo DNA and DNA LOFT cushioning work together to provide a just-right softness underfoot without losing responsiveness and durability—yet it feels lighter than ever.
SMOOTH, STABLE RIDE: The Segmented Crash Pad is designed to adapt to each foot fall, so no matter how your foot lands, you’ll enjoy the smoothest ride possible.
SOFT, SECURE FIT: The newly engineered mesh upper practically disappears on foot with strategically placed stretch and structure where you need it most.

reviews.title: Perfect pair of Running shoes
reviews.text: I’ve been wearing Brooks running shoes for about 4 years now and they do not disappoint. At first I thought the Ghost 11 would take some time to break in unlike my other Brooks running shoes. This was not the case as by day 2 they felt very comfortable. I will continue to wear Brooks running shoes. I am a fan. I’ve even convinced my husband to switch from New Balance to Brooks and he did.

reviews.title: Brooks are the best!!

The width of the 8.5 is good, if you have wider feet. Not sure how a correct size would fit the width. All around pretty good shoe for the money.

reviews.title: True to my size, as always. Super comfy for a big guy.
reviews.text: My goodness I love these shoes. The 23’s are just my favorite. It’s nice I can get them here because a lot of times you can’t find the “older” model in the shoe store.

title: Saucony Women's Switchback 2 Trail Running Shoe
description: Dialed to grip and rip trails fast. For trail runners looking to get to their destination fast, The lightweight Switchback 2 is a race-ready machine that delivers more of what you need—long-distance cushioning placed into a nimble, grippy, and dialed-in package.
features: Synthetic-and-mesh
Rubber sole

reviews.title: Love the idea, needs some redesign
reviews.text: I really want to like this shoe more. I do actually use them a lot but it took nearly half a year to really break them in, and they’re still fairly difficult to slip into, as the opening is not very flexible. The shoe itself is tight enough where the laces don’t even really need to be there, and the toe box is fairly narrow which isn’t very good for running and hiking. My pinky toe often feels wedged by this one part of the design and frequently causes pain. I really REALLY like the idea of this shoe though and it’s still wearable for moderate hikes under 2 hours, I just wish they put more work and testing. It’s probably better for people with thinner, narrower feet. My feet are medium wide and the top part is kind of high.

reviews.title: Fits just right
reviews.text: I like the way the shoes fit; however, they are more attractive in the picture than on my feet, at least to me.  They are a little pricey too, but all in all, I would recommend them.

title: New Balance Men's 510 V5 Trail Running Shoe
description: Are you looking for a lightweight, durable and supportive pair of trail running shoes? Then your search ends with the New Balance 510v5. Durability on the outside meets responsive comfort inside for a lightweight running shoe that's as ready as you are for a trail run or whatever else your day has in store. Built with a rugged construction, these New Balance trail shoes offer relentless durability that is suitable for various runs both on- and off-road. The lugged outsole on these comfortable running shoes features AT TREAD technology which provides enhanced traction on the trail or the road, while the lightweight injection-molded EVA foam midsole includes both ABZORB technology for impact absorption and an NB Soft + Supportive Insert for memory comfort that lasts. For added protection, the reinforced Toe Protect tip helps protect your toes from rocks, roots and debris so you can go off-road with confidence.
features: 50% Synthetic, 50% Textile
Imported
Rubber sole

Cushioned Running Shoes: ABZORB midsole technology in this runner absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance, and the rubber outsole provides strength and durability
Built-In Off-Road Technology: Toe Protect technology helps protect feet from rocks, roots and debris, while AT Tread on the outsole provides versatile traction during both on- and off-road activities
Plush, Cushioned Running Shoes: These runners feature lightweight injection-molded EVA foam midsoles to provide lightweight cushioning and an NB Soft + Supportive Insert for memory comfort that lasts
Built to Last: With an all-over durable construction and an aggressive lugged outsole, these trail running shoes are designed to stand up to all of your outdoor activities
Athletic Aesthetic: With synthetic and mesh uppers that deliver breathability and a top-quality fit, these running shoes also boast a stylish look to fit in with your active lifestyle

reviews.title: Very good quality and comfort
reviews.text: This is my 2nd pair. Great quality and comfort. Nice looking too. True to size. Both pairs have lasted me a long time. Highly recommend.

reviews.title: New Balance shoes fit me the best of all the major brands.

title: Brooks Men’s Launch 9 Neutral Running Shoe
features: Imported

THIS MEN’S SHOE IS FOR: The Launch 9 is for neutral runners who want a dependable, lightweight shoe with DNA cushioning and a highly breathable upper that helps runners go fast on every run. We recommend ordering Brooks running shoes 1/2 to one size larger than your dress shoe.
NEUTRAL SUPPORT: Lightweight, streamlined, with even more BioMoGo DNA cushioning, the Launch 9 offers neutral support to keep you running faster mile after mile.
ENHANCED BREATHABILITY: Reengineered upper features Creel Warp mesh, designed to be extremely light and breathable. Hints of reflectivity on the upper to increase visibility on the road.

LIGHTWEIGHT CUSHIONING: We have added more BioMoGo DNA cushioning to the midsole for an even faster ride without the extra weight. A dynamically responsive ride for days when you are working on your speed.
RESPONSIVE TRANSITIONS: Redesigned midsole increased by 2 mm to provide runners with more responsiveness while the Green Rubber Outsole helps your foot move quickly from heel to toe.

reviews.title: My new favorite running shoe.
reviews.text: Perfect fit right out of the box.  Wonderful cushioned run and very light weight.  Well made and no signs of wear even after several long runs.  Wide enough toe box to prevent any rubbing.  True to size.

reviews.title: TREAT IT LIKE A SOCK
reviews.text:
PROS: Lightweight; very soft rubber soles (I would say strictly intended for inside use if you want them to last); and extremely comfortable.
CONS: Laces are too long (I replaced with "Lock Laces"); there's a learning curve to putting them on so as to avoid pulled muscles, damaged back, dislocated shoulder. Think about how you put on socks, then practice. These are not "shoes."

reviews.title: Very nice comfortable shoes
reviews.text: I like them very much, stylish, lots of compliments.  Color is perfect. (light Blue)

reviews.title: It's okay!
reviews.text:
These are based off the famous shoe from the other brand , it rhymes with Beezy450, which costs $100s of dollars! They are just a sock mesh put into a mold, where hot rubber is poured into the bottom which makes the sole. Put in a soft insole and boom, you got a foam runner shoe. Well these shoes are the same thing as the big brand, just without any logos.
The fit is not good for wide feet. They are only good for narrow and normal. If your feet is identical to the mold that they use for generic sizes, then it will fit you perfect and be very comfortable.
These are casual shoes and won't be great for dedicated sports like basketball or cross-country. 5-stars for being a great alternative to big name brands and for being very affordable. I can't think of anything bad to say about this shoe.

reviews.title: Love them
reviews.text: These shoes are lightweight, trendy & comfortable. Most shoes don't have all 3 for me. The price is great and are better than some of the tip brands out there. I definitely recommend these shoes. The quality is better than I expected.

reviews.title: Fit was expected
reviews.text: These are comparable to my name-brand sneakers. They fit well and are comfortable to wear, I'm very pleased with them and recommend them.
